basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support II (PTS-II) Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support II (PTS-II) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per AIIMS/ICMR rules

qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering) with Five years' experience in the relevant subject/field
qualification.details: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering) with Five years' experience in the relevant subject/field

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical support II (PTS-II) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical support II (PTS-II) recruitment is 03-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed their 12th grade in Science and possess a Diploma in MLT/DMLT/Engineering. Additionally, five years of relevant experience in the subject or field is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical support II (PTS-II) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the rules and regulations of AIIMS and ICMR.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical support II (PTS-II) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000 per month, along with HRA as admissible.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical support II (PTS-II) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical support II (PTS-II) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: shortlisting of candidates based on their Google Form applications, followed by an interview, which can be conducted offline or online.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this? Is it a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The recruitment is for a Project Technical support II (PTS-II) position on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read the notification carefully before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi), New Delhi, with the pincode 110029.
